pcaconnectorad.template.privatekeyflagsv: Private key flags for v2 templates specify the client compatibility, if the private key can be exported, and if user input is required when using a private key.

pcaconnectorad.template.privatekeyflagsv.Allowed values: WINDOWS_SERVER_2003 | WINDOWS_SERVER_2008 | WINDOWS_SERVER_2008_R2 | WINDOWS_SERVER_2012 | WINDOWS_SERVER_2012_R2 | WINDOWS_SERVER_2016

pcaconnectorad.template.privatekeyflagsv.Description: Allows the private key to be exported.
Require user input when using the private key for enrollment.
